name: Coral Crater Adventure Park
tagline: Ziplines, an aerial adventure course, and ATV rides inside a volcanic crater — an adrenaline rush for older keiki.
hours: Daily 8am–4pm; book activities online in advance
bestTime: Morning for cooler temps; weekdays for shorter waits on courses
kamaaina: Kamaaina rates with Hawaii ID — check website for current local pricing
talkStory: Best for ages 7 and up. The aerial adventure course has different difficulty levels so you can match to your kid's comfort. The zipline is a thrill for tweens and teens. Younger kids (4+) can do the junior course. Closed-toe shoes required. Bring water and sunscreen — it's hot and dry out in Kapolei. Combo packages save money if you want to do multiple activities.
